Class RetrievalCompleteEvent<E extends IEfsEvent>

java.lang.Object
org.efs.io.RetrievalCompleteEvent<E>
Type Parameters:
E - efs event type.
All Implemented Interfaces:
IEfsEvent
public final class RetrievalCompleteEvent<E extends IEfsEvent> extends Object implements IEfsEvent
EfsFile posts this event to target agent signifying a retrieval reached its termination.
Author:
Charles W. Rapp

  • Nested Class Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    RetrievalCompleteEvent.CompletionType
    A retrieval request ends either due to it reaching its ending point or user cancellation.

    Returns timestamp when efs event retrieval completed.

    Returns reason for retrieval completion.
